form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Dubbo when only a nose from the winner but did record a solid 29.68 over the 516m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Narrowly beaten last time at Dubbo when only a nose from the winner but did record a solid 29.68 over the 516m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Good starter. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 4/5 on March 10 over 400m at Bulli behind Overflow Beau beaten 5 lengths (22.59). Has a strong record from box 2, including three wins. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good starter. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 4/5 on March 10 over 400m at Bulli behind Overflow Beau beaten 5 lengths (22.59). Has a strong record from box 2, including three wins. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (29.71) beating Fine Shine in a Grade 5 on February 28. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at Richmond over 401m (22.57) beating Sammy My Boy in Free For All on March 27. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by 2.5 lengths at The Gardens over 400m (22.96) beating Impatient Rose in Grade 3/4 on March 28. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: In fine form with wins at her last couple of outings when well in the market at this track. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with the running rail rounding the home turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished second at Nowra latest but prior to that clocked a fast 29.83 over 520m finishing third at Nowra. Can come into calculations at odds.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen raced tightly and hampered.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 1.75 lengths win at Richmond over 520m in 29.48. Has an outstanding 29.59 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by one length at Bulli over 400m (22.52) beating Magic Linkin in Grade 4/5 on March 31. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 3rd over 520m at this track beaten half a length (30.01) behind Tarawi Banjo in a Grade 5 on April 2. Should prove hard to beat.
